arts.sum: Torino and Atalanta are both showing interest in Tino Anjorin, the talented midfielder currently playing for Empoli. arts.sum: Ronald Araujo looks destined to leave Barcelona this month, and in the last few days, an offer was received from Juventus for the Uruguayan defender. However, it was turned down by the Catalan giants.
